haikus.haiku:
Bubbles rise and dance,
Fried catfish scents fill the air,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #NationalCatfishDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Woodsmoke fills the air,
Rustling leaves in crisp cool breeze,
Cozy hearts unite.
Happy #LogCabinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful cheers resound,
Cake and dreams in the sweet air,
Pages turn with hope.
#HappyBirthdayGeorgeOrwell from @ClamBakeSanta

content:

Joyful hearts unite.
